mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM payment WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM payment WHERE (create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) OR (payment_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (user_id, reservation_id, payment_no, amount, payment_method, status, transaction_id, payment_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reservationId}, #{paymentNo}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status}, #{transactionId}, #{paymentTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
